title: feat: add account and media endpoints to llm.txt
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Feeding the bots
gist.blurb: We've expanded our llm.txt file to cover all 22 API endpoints, including account management and media storage. Now your AI agents have the full map to the hive.
gist.summary: Expanded the llm.txt documentation endpoint to include all account management and media storage APIs.
gist.impact: AI agents and LLM-based tools can now automatically discover and understand the complete set of 22 pollinations.ai API endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating a large text file or digital scroll labeled 'llm.txt', representing AI agents consuming documentation. Polly the bee watches happily, holding a tiny pointer stick. The scene takes place in a cozy digital library or server room.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a glowing digital scroll labeled 'llm.txt' while Polly the bee mascot watches amused, holding a tiny pointer stick. A retro terminal nearby glows lime green (#ecf874) showing clean API code blocks. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
